name: RecoilApp::MarkSkipWaitMessage
description: RecoilApp::MarkSkipWaitMessage returns the current skip-wait message flag and sets it to the skipped/one state.
known_limits: Binary-safe verification is accepted by the recoil_app_skip_wait_message VC target.
functional_evidence: Binary Ninja assembly/decompilation for 0x442a30 validates loading the skip-wait field at offset 0xd0, setting that field to one, and returning the original value with no callees.
The native smoke verifies MarkSkipWaitMessage returns zero on the first mark, stores one, then returns one and preserves one on a second mark.
